description: Pre-battle dialogue with the assassin Ratfang Snotcheeze

nodes.text: *A hooded rat-man steps from the shadows, dagger gleaming in the dim light*

nodes.speaker: Ratfang Snotcheeze
nodes.text: Well, well... you must be the one. They said you'd be trouble, but you don't look like much to me.

nodes.speaker: Ratfang Snotcheeze
nodes.text: Name's Ratfang Snotcheeze, and I've been paid handsomely to make sure you never reach your destination.

nodes.speaker: Ratfang Snotcheeze
nodes.text: Now hold still - this'll only hurt... a lot.
